results.title: 4 injured after Air Canada plane collides with vehicle at New York's LaGuardia Airport
results.description: Four people were injured when an Air Canada passenger plane collided with a fire truck on New York’s LaGuardia Airport runway, according to sources familiar with the matter. NBC News’ Jessica Layton, Jay Blackman, and Jeff Guzzetti report on the incident and the injuries to the pilot and copilot.
creator: nbc news
